Alright, you're back. Let's take the next step in the process to break this belief. Here's the way it works. All beliefs have consequences, meaning the fact that you have this limiting belief in place, right? And now you're essentially brought it above the surface. We're looking at it. We're examining it. We know how it formed. Tell me what it costs you. In other words, what decisions did you not make or did you make that were bad decisions because of this belief? How has it impacted your life negatively? What things have passed you by? What decisions did you make that you simply wouldn't have made that hurt you because of this belief? Please do this right now. Go back onto the resource center right now, write down at least five consequences that are a direct result of this limiting belief. And when you're done, meet me right back in the next lesson.
